title: Binaria rubiginosa
taxonomy: Binaria rubiginosa is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The classification of Binaria rubiginosa is as follows: it belongs to the genus Binaria, family Rubiaceae, order Lamiales, class Magnoliopsida, and kingdom Plantae. This plant is a member of the large and diverse family Rubiaceae, which includes many other plants commonly known as coffee and gardenias. Further research may be necessary to determine the specific relationships between Binaria rubiginosa and other species within the Rubiaceae family.

It is said to be used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections.
